Who We Are

More Than A
Baseball Team

The Western Iowa Bucks are a competitive travel baseball organization based in Council Bluffs, Iowa. We were built from the ground up with one mission: develop great baseball players and even better people.

We compete at the highest local and regional levels, giving our athletes the experience and exposure they need to grow — on the field and off it. Every practice, every game, every at-bat is an opportunity to get better.

01
Development
Skill-first coaching with a focus on fundamentals and long-term growth.
02
Competition
Travel schedule built to challenge and elevate every player on the roster.
03
Character
We hold our players to a standard that goes beyond the box score.
04
Community
Proudly representing Council Bluffs and western Iowa.

Our Teams

10U
Western Iowa Bucks

Our flagship team competing at the 10U AA level in the 2026 summer season. A competitive travel schedule against top programs across the region, with player development at every position built into everything we do.

The Western Iowa Bucks are expanding for the 2027 season. We're holding open tryouts for our new 8U and 11U teams. Come show us what you've got.
